project_info.name: Arthur de Oliveira dos Santos Portfolio
project_info.role: Creative Developer / Videographer / Photographer / AI Enthusiast
project_info.description: Award-winning style portfolio inspired by Awwwards-winning websites and premium creative agencies. Premium, minimalist and futuristic.

primary.usage: Headings and Body. Use extreme weight contrast (e.g., font-black for H1, font-light for subtitles).

mono.usage: Overlines, labels, technical details, statistics numbers. Use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines.

rules: H1 must be fluid, e.g., text-5xl md:text-7xl with tracking-tighter and leading-none.
Avoid standard bold headers; use Black or Light.
Line height: leading-relaxed for body, leading-none for large headings.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: TETRIS Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetrical, high tension. Mix col-span-8, col-span-4 to avoid perfectly equal boxes.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous padding. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. Massive gaps (gap-8 to gap-16) between sections.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant). bg-white/5 or bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-2xl and 1px border-white/10. Add subtle inner shadow or light border for optical clarity.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align text for better readability, use negative space aggressively.

patterns: Smooth Scrolling: MUST implement Lenis for premium scroll feel.
Custom Cursor: A glowing or inverted custom cursor using framer-motion.
Page Transitions: Elegant fade and slight translate-y on route changes or section mounts.
Scroll Reveal: Elements fade in and slide up slightly as they enter the viewport.
Parallax: Background images and floating elements move at a different speed than the scroll.
Hover States: Cards should have a subtle lift (-translate-y-1), increased glass opacity, and a glowing border effect on hover.

components_and_sections.name: Navigation
components_and_sections.features: Fixed top, glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur-xl), logo on left, links and CTA on right. Must be fully visible on desktop.

components_and_sections.name: Hero Section
components_and_sections.features: Massive typography (Satoshi Black). Background video (or animated dark mesh if video unavailable). Overlay bg-black/50 to ensure text contrast. Floating elements (badges). Custom cursor interaction area.

components_and_sections.name: About / Experience
components_and_sections.features: Timeline of experience. Minimalist nodes. Animated progress lines on scroll. Mono font for dates.

components_and_sections.name: Skills
components_and_sections.features: Animated bars or circular progress indicators. Glowing accents (#06B6D4 cyan).

components_and_sections.name: Projects / Videos / Photography Galleries
components_and_sections.features: Bento grid (Tetris style) for cards. Hovering over a card reveals a play button or project details. Subtle zoom on image inside card on hover.

components_and_sections.name: Statistics
components_and_sections.features: Counters that animate from 0 when scrolled into view. JetBrains Mono font for numbers.

components_and_sections.name: Contact
components_and_sections.features: Real functional form. Shadcn Input/Textarea stripped of standard borders, styled with glassmorphism (bg-white/5, border-white/10). Glowing submit button.

components_and_sections.name: Footer
components_and_sections.features: Massive text for 'Let's Talk'. Social links. Massive spacing (py-32).

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
accessibility_and_testing.accessibility: Ensure text over gradients/images meets 4.5:1 APCA contrast ratio. Add aria-hidden to purely decorative animations.

videography_projects.alt: Futuristic cyberpunk neon city video shot

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all packages are installed: framer-motion, lucide-react, @studio-freight/react-lenis.
Use standard Tailwind classes. For glassmorphism, use 'bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10'.
Do NOT use generic white backgrounds anywhere. Stick to the dark theme palette.
Apply data-testid to every clickable element and form input.
Implement the pages mentioned: Home, Sobre (About), Projetos (Projects), Vídeos, Fotografia, Competências (Skills), Contacto.
Typography: Import Satoshi (e.g., from Fontshare) and JetBrains Mono (from Google Fonts) in index.css or index.html.
For the hero background video, if a raw mp4 is not available, use one of the dark mesh images as a background with a subtle CSS animation or an animated particle/mesh effect.
